title: A Folk Story About a Clever Cat
article_text: A long time ago, a folk story said that a clever cat could understand human intelligence. The cat would sit on a hill and watch the yard below with constant attention. One day, a guard shouted when he saw a strange animal disappear behind a tree. The cat's ears were large, and it could hear a considerable distance. The cat used to kiss its owner every morning to show love. The owner gave the cat a joint of meat as a reward for its good behavior. The cat's intelligence was ideal for catching mice in the yard. A researcher once said that the cat's intelligence was significantly better than an ordinary cat. The cat surely knew how to follow instructions without any trouble. The proportion of successful hunts was very high, which made the cat a perfect presentation of a skilled hunter.

sentences.en: A long time ago, a folk story said that a clever cat could understand human intelligence.
sentences.zh: 很久以前，一个民间故事说一只聪明的猫能理解人类的智力。

words.eng_def: relating to the traditional culture of a group of people
a description of events that are not real
a small animal with soft fur that people keep as a pet
the ability to learn and understand things

sentences.en: The cat would sit on a hill and watch the yard below with constant attention.
sentences.zh: 这只猫会坐在一座小山上，以持续的注意力观察下面的院子。

words.eng_def: a raised area of land, smaller than a mountain
an area of land next to a building
happening all the time or very often

sentences.en: One day, a guard shouted when he saw a strange animal disappear behind a tree.
sentences.zh: 一天，一个守卫看到一只奇怪的动物消失在树后时大喊了起来。

words.eng_def: a person who protects a place or person
to become impossible to see or find

sentences.en: The cat's ears were large, and it could hear a considerable distance.
sentences.zh: 猫的耳朵很大，能听到相当远的距离。

words.eng_def: the part of the body used for hearing
large in size, amount, or degree

sentences.en: The cat used to kiss its owner every morning to show love.
sentences.zh: 这只猫过去每天早上都会亲吻主人以表达爱意。

words.eng_def: to touch someone with the lips as a sign of love

sentences.en: The owner gave the cat a joint of meat as a reward for its good behavior.
sentences.zh: 主人给了猫一大块肉作为它良好行为的奖励。

words.eng_def: a large piece of meat for cooking

sentences.en: The cat's intelligence was ideal for catching mice in the yard.
sentences.zh: 这只猫的智力非常适合在院子里抓老鼠。

sentences.en: A researcher once said that the cat's intelligence was significantly better than an ordinary cat.
sentences.zh: 一位研究人员曾说过，这只猫的智力明显优于普通猫。

words.eng_def: a person who studies something carefully
in an important or noticeable way

sentences.en: The cat surely knew how to follow instructions without any trouble.
sentences.zh: 这只猫当然知道如何毫不费力地遵循指令。

words.eng_def: information on how to do something

sentences.en: The proportion of successful hunts was very high, which made the cat a perfect presentation of a skilled hunter.
sentences.zh: 成功捕猎的比例非常高，这使得这只猫成为熟练猎手的完美展示。

words.eng_def: the amount of one thing compared to another
the act of showing or explaining something to people
